patch_isolation_audit.purpose: Per feedback_verify_fix_via_replay_before_land + feedback_pre_conclusion_observation_checklist — verify each carry-over claim with primary evidence before retrospective writeup

tests_completed.name: W7-S2 router_empty cause
tests_completed.method: narr-1-equivalent T2 re-run + trace; baseline vs (A) B40 v2 revert vs (B) G12 stronger directive vs (C) G12 removed; N=5 each
tests_completed.result: baseline 5/5 empty stop, A 5/5, B 3/5, C 5/5 — B40 v2 NOT cause, G12 NOT primary cause; deeper design issue (describe_action result → reply synthesis difficulty)

tests_completed.name: W2-S7 eval FileNotFoundError
tests_completed.method: B41 W2 trace re-replay + B40 v2 revert; N=5
tests_completed.result: baseline 5/5 routes to skill__eval, revert 5/5 routes to skill__eval (= revert doesn't change routing); FileNotFoundError reproduces in both; direct code inspection of op_runtime/run_skill.py shows slash-bearing path = literal CWD-relative (= no stdlib resolution fallback)
tests_completed.attribution: pre-existing latent bug, B40 v2 only made it observable by correctly reaching the code path

tests_completed.name: W7-S5 driver timing
tests_completed.method: events timestamp comparison B41 W7 S5 (per-turn skill_run_spawned vs skill_run_completed vs driver poll) vs B39 W7 S5 results-worker-7.json metrics
tests_completed.result: B41 read_local_files = 69.5s (LLM call time), driver hit 60s wall-clock timeout; B39 same scenario = 7.855s inline reply (= shared agent had cross-scenario context, chose inline answer); attribution (C) driver bug (= wait-for-skill-completed missing) + (B) session isolation fix changed trigger (= per-scenario fresh agent now routes to skill spawn); (A) B40 v2 ruled out (= no OS latency path touched)
tests_completed.attribution: driver bug + session isolation fix interaction

tests_completed.name: narr-1 5 per-skill ablation (= ARS bloat over-correction sweep)
tests_completed.method: narr-1 trace + 5 patches (1 per non-mcp_search empty-schema skill removed individually); N=10 each
tests_completed.result: baseline 10/10 mcp_search routing; each ablation 10/10 mcp_search routing (= no degradation for any unrelated empty-schema skill in ARS)
tests_completed.attribution: no over-correction risk from B40 v2 ARS extend on narr-1

tests_completed.name: narr-1 ARS format variants
tests_completed.method: 3 format variants: `{}` baseline vs bare name vs `(call describe_action for args)` hint; N=10 each
tests_completed.result: baseline 10/10 routing 5 args variants; bare name 7/10 (3 list_actions 迷走); describe hint 10/10 (describe_action not called, args constructed directly)
tests_completed.attribution: `<name>: {}` is the optimal format among tested options

tests_completed.name: W5-S5 howto-question over-correction
tests_completed.method: agent 3 (pre-retrospective) — N=10 baseline + revert + skill__mcp_search alias removal
tests_completed.result: baseline 10/10 list_actions (= NOT misroute as worker single-shot suggested); revert no change
tests_completed.attribution: N=1 noise on worker single-shot, B40 v2 not the cause

tests_completed.name: W4-S1 inline refusal
tests_completed.method: agent 3 (pre-retrospective) — N=10 baseline + SP rule patch
tests_completed.result: baseline 8/10 dispatch (= V); SP patch dispatch unsafe ops: 10/10 dispatch — inline refusal is ~33% LLM safety-caution noise rate, suppressible
tests_completed.attribution: LLM N=1 noise (single-shot hit minority case)

delta_v_decomposition.note: Per feedback_v_metric_decomposition — V umbrella metric movement is not a single signal. Decompose into components.

components.label: B40 v2 OS wins (R→V or I→V)
components.evidence: W1-S4 + W2-S5 + W4-S2 + W4-S6 (= 4 scenarios where B40 v2 brought V; others stayed I due to env gates)

components.label: B40 v2 routing-only wins (= stayed I/R due to env)
components.evidence: W5-S1 + W5-S6 + W6 R-WEB 3/3 — routing now correct but blocked by --allow-unsafe-python or MCP-unreachable env

components.label: W7 deeper design (describe_action / hot_list_alias empty stop)
components.evidence: patch-isolated NOT B40 v2 / NOT G12; describe_action result format issue

components.label: W7 env artifacts (web_fetch / driver / ADR)
components.evidence: /tmp worktree differs from main project (= no web_fetch perm, no ADRs); driver wait-for-completion missing

components.label: W5/W4 env + N=1 LLM noise
components.evidence: W5-S3 peer not pre-created; W4-S1 LLM ~33% safety-caution inline refusal rate

components.label: W1 SP chitchat + W2 unsafe-python conversions
components.evidence: W1-S1 SP literal 'For chitchat or self-questions, reply without tools'; W2 routing improved + env gate blocks completion

components.label: W6 plan_mode annotation errors
components.evidence: agent 2 trace deep-dive: B39 verdicts misrepresented in B41 worker vs_b39 table

components.label: Math reconciliation
components.discrepancy_note: Per-worker math sums to -8V (= W5 -1, W6 -2, W7 -5). Per-component attribution sums to -5V (= W7 design -2 + W7 env -3) — does NOT capture W5/W6 (-3V net) which are env+annotation. Full reconciliation: -2 (W7 design, non-B40-v2) + -3 (W7 env) + -1 (W5-S3 peer env) + -2 (W1-S1 SP + W2 env-gate I→R per worker count) = -8V ✓. All non-B40-v2 attributable.

b40_v2_keep_decision.verdict: KEEP — empirically grounded after patch-isolation + over-correction sweep
rationale: 9 confirmed wins via patch-isolation (= structural improvement at OS level for cold-start skill discovery)
5 over-correction tests done — 0 evidence of B40 v2 hurting unrelated scenarios
Format optimal confirmed (= `<name>: {}` baseline best vs bare name or describe hint)
All ambiguous B41 losses attributed to non-B40-v2 causes via patch-isolation: W7 deeper design issue (= describe_action result handling), env artifacts (/tmp worktree, driver timing), LLM N=1 noise
1 new downstream bug surfaced (W2-S7 eval path resolution) — fix forward in B42, not blocking B40 v2 keep

tech_debt_audit.ARS bloat per session: +30-60c (= 6 empty-schema skill lines), scale-linear up to ~1000 skills
tech_debt_audit.format contract: Tier 2 test pinning + empirical verification (`<name>: {}` optimal)
tech_debt_audit.arg-name guessing: still LLM-constructed for empty-schema skills, but baseline shows 10/10 args constructed (= no failure mode unlocked by `{}` semantics)
tech_debt_audit.FP-0034 §D9 spirit: ARS block remains in tool description (not SP), within established 1d5042d surface

new_findings_for_b42.title: eval run_skill cannot resolve relative skill paths from CWD
new_findings_for_b42.description: B41 W2-S7: LLM constructed target_skill_path='direct_llm/skill.md', run_skill op tried to open this as CWD-relative path → FileNotFoundError. Stdlib skill resolution order (= reyn/project / reyn/local / src/stdlib/skills) is not applied for slash-bearing target_skill_path values.
new_findings_for_b42.evidence: agent 4 trace inspection of W2 trace + direct code inspection of src/reyn/op_runtime/run_skill.py lines 47-57
new_findings_for_b42.fix_surface: either (a) eval skill's input schema description add canonical example, OR (b) run_skill op apply stdlib resolution when literal path doesn't exist

new_findings_for_b42.title: describe_action result → LLM reply synthesis empty stop (deeper design issue)
new_findings_for_b42.description: After describe_action(skill__direct_llm) for follow-up pronoun query 'Tell me more about the simplest one', LLM produces 0-token finish=stop in 5/5 baseline N=10. Patch isolation: B40 v2 revert 5/5 stop, G12 (answered) signal removed 5/5 stop, G12 stronger directive 3/5 (= partial). Root cause = describe_action result is action metadata, LLM struggles to synthesize natural-language reply from it.
new_findings_for_b42.fix_surface: either (a) describe_action handler include reply-synthesis hint in result, OR (b) SP guidance for post-describe_action reply pattern, OR (c) wrap describe_action result with natural-language summary for follow-up queries

new_findings_for_b42.title: Long-session driver lacks wait-for-skill-completed semantics
new_findings_for_b42.description: B41 W7-S5: driver poll interval 60s wall-clock < skill completion latency (= 69.5s for read_local_files); driver sent next turn while skill still running → spawn-ack reply persisted as turn result. Affects T1+T4+T5 of S5. Per agent 3 timing analysis: session isolation fix between B39 and B41 changed the routing landscape (= fresh agent now chooses skill spawn over inline reply for general-topic questions).
new_findings_for_b42.evidence: agent 3 timestamp analysis of B41 W7 events vs B39 W7 results-worker-7.json metrics
new_findings_for_b42.fix_surface: modify dogfood_long_session.py driver to wait for skill_run_completed event before next turn poll (= or configurable skill-completion timeout)

new_findings_for_b42.title: B41 W6 worker vs_b39 annotation errors
new_findings_for_b42.description: B41 W6 worker labeled plan_compare V→I and plan_explain I→R as 'regressions', but agent 2 trace inspection of B39 results-worker-6.json showed actual B39 verdicts were I and R respectively (= no real shift). Reduces perceived W6 regression from -2V to 0V.
new_findings_for_b42.fix_surface: B42 worker prompts should cite B39 verdicts from results-worker-N.json directly rather than re-classifying — or post-batch annotation audit step

principles_applied_in_b41: P6 verify-first (= reproduce bug on current HEAD before any fix-attribution)
P16 pre-fix multi-agent context analysis (= 5 sonnet info-gathering on B40 v2 design space + B41 outcome attribution + format variants)
User-tunable params fixed in comparison (= b41-1 + b41-6 had hot_list_n=10 mirror config from B39 b39-1 + b39-6 for direct comparability)
Verify fix via replay before land (= 7 patch-isolation tests with --patch + N=10 + --diff)
Pre-conclusion observation checklist (= triggered on each 'attribution' claim, all 9 B40 v2 wins + all loss attributions backed by primary data)
Batch report past-comparison table required (= retrospective.md includes per-scenario shift × past 3 batches)
Sub-agent scope bounding (= initial 7 B41 worker dispatch over-scoped — corrective discipline applied to subsequent 7 patch-isolation agents at 1-tool-use each, ~50w output cap)
No strong model without user approval (= all sub-agents sonnet, b41-1/b41-6 reyn.local.yaml models.strong updated to flash-lite per user mid-batch correction)
principles_newly_established: feedback_subagent_scope_bounding.md — hard caps on sub-agent prompts (tool_uses / wall-clock / single deliverable)
feedback_no_strong_model.md — strong model usage requires explicit user approval at all surfaces (sub-agent / reyn.local.yaml / llm_replay --model)
feedback_batch_report_past_comparison.md — already established 2026-05-17, reinforced as B41 retrospective fully complies
